what_page_provides: Leaflet/Mapbox fire weather forecast map with time controls and multiple JS-managed layer groups.
likely_endpoint_families: Static JSON family under /static/json/, including zone merge data.
GeoMet root family referenced in JS for weather layer access.
Optional external tile families such as WAQI PM2.5 tiles appear in the layer-controller bundle.
likely_layer_families: Fire weather raster/time layers managed by local JS bundles.
Station/location overlays implied by wxstations and grouped layer control bundles.
auth_notes: Public site. No auth barrier observed. Main page is JS-heavy and likely assembles layer URLs at runtime; bounded recon captured only directly visible families and specimens.

endpoints.notes: JS bundle references geomet root and external tile families.
GeoMet root string appears in the layer-controller bundle; direct root fetch returned a service exception asking for WMS/WFS/WCS parameters.
Optional external PM2.5 tile family visible in JS.

widgets.label: Fire weather map layer
widgets.notes: Page purpose and JS structure strongly suggest time-based fire weather layers.

widgets.label: Smoke forecast layer
widgets.notes: FireSmoke surface is map-centric but exact smoke layer URLs were not fully expanded in bounded recon.

widgets.label: Air quality overlay
widgets.notes: WAQI tiles appear in the layer controller bundle as an optional overlay family.
